name: hagicode-desktop
description: Desktop client for Hagicode Server management and monitoring

scripts.i18n:check: npm run i18n:audit && npm run i18n:doctor && npm run prepare:i18n && node scripts/generate-i18n-resources.mjs --check && node --test scripts/__tests__/generate-i18n-resources.test.mjs && npm run build:tsc && npm run test:source -- src/renderer/i18n/__tests__/locale-resources.test.ts && npm run build:renderer
scripts.prebuild:renderer: npm run prepare:i18n && npm run prepare:about-snapshot && npm run prepare:managed-npm-packages
scripts.predev:renderer: npm run prepare:i18n && npm run prepare:about-snapshot && npm run prepare:managed-npm-packages
scripts.build:tsc: npm run prepare:managed-npm-packages && npm run check:ts-import-extensions && npx tsc
scripts.build:tsc:check: npm run prepare:managed-npm-packages && npm run check:ts-import-extensions && npx tsc --noEmit
scripts.build:all: npm run build:tsc && npm run build:preload && npm run build:renderer
scripts.build:check: npm run build:tsc:check && npm run build:renderer
scripts.build:prod: npm run build:all && npm run smoke-test
scripts.dev:electron: node scripts/wait-for-dev-ready.js tcp:127.0.0.1:36598 dist/preload/index.mjs dist/main/bootstrap.js dist/main/main.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=development HAGICODE_DESKTOP_INSTANCE_NAME=hagicode_dev HAGICO_CONFIG_PATH=local_data_root node scripts/run-electron-app.js .
scripts.dev: node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.existsSync('dist')&&fs.rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && concurrently -k "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run dev:main" "npm run dev:preload" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build:win:msix: cross-env HAGICODE_RUNTIME_CONSUMER=windows-store HAGICODE_RUNTIME_DEPENDENCY_MANAGEMENT_MODE=external node scripts/ci-build.js --platform win --target msix
scripts.build:mac:x64: cross-env HAGICODE_MAC_BUILD_ARCHS=x64 HAGICODE_EMBEDDED_DOTNET_PLATFORM=osx-x64 HAGICODE_EMBEDDED_NODE_PLATFORM=osx-x64 node scripts/ci-build.js --platform mac
scripts.build:mac:x64:dmg: cross-env HAGICODE_MAC_BUILD_ARCHS=x64 HAGICODE_EMBEDDED_DOTNET_PLATFORM=osx-x64 HAGICODE_EMBEDDED_NODE_PLATFORM=osx-x64 node scripts/ci-build.js --platform mac --target dmg
scripts.build:mac:x64:zip: cross-env HAGICODE_MAC_BUILD_ARCHS=x64 HAGICODE_EMBEDDED_DOTNET_PLATFORM=osx-x64 HAGICODE_EMBEDDED_NODE_PLATFORM=osx-x64 node scripts/ci-build.js --platform mac --target zip
scripts.build:mac:arm64: cross-env HAGICODE_MAC_BUILD_ARCHS=arm64 HAGICODE_EMBEDDED_DOTNET_PLATFORM=osx-arm64 HAGICODE_EMBEDDED_NODE_PLATFORM=osx-arm64 node scripts/ci-build.js --platform mac
scripts.build:mac:arm64:dmg: cross-env HAGICODE_MAC_BUILD_ARCHS=arm64 HAGICODE_EMBEDDED_DOTNET_PLATFORM=osx-arm64 HAGICODE_EMBEDDED_NODE_PLATFORM=osx-arm64 node scripts/ci-build.js --platform mac --target dmg
scripts.build:mac:arm64:zip: cross-env HAGICODE_MAC_BUILD_ARCHS=arm64 HAGICODE_EMBEDDED_DOTNET_PLATFORM=osx-arm64 HAGICODE_EMBEDDED_NODE_PLATFORM=osx-arm64 node scripts/ci-build.js --platform mac --target zip
scripts.build:linux:unpacked: npm run prepare:runtime && npm run prepare:bundled-toolchain && npm run build:prod && node scripts/run-electron-forge.js --platform linux --arch $(node -p "process.arch") --package-only && npm run package:verify-linux-unpacked && npm run package:smoke-test
scripts.build:local: npm run version:bump && npm run build
scripts.predev: cross-env HAGICODE_DESKTOP_INSTANCE_NAME=hagicode_dev npm run prepare:runtime:optional && cross-env HAGICODE_DESKTOP_INSTANCE_NAME=hagicode_dev npm run prepare:bundled-toolchain:optional
